evidence_quotes.quote: I would like that the content I bought would still be accessible to me even if the content will no longer be allowed for purchase in my area/country or give me full refound of bought digital content.

After having access to the movies for some time they were removed from my purchased movies and were delete from my downloads (or made unaccessible) because thoes movies were no longer allowed in my area/country.

paragraphs.text: Hello. I would like to request a better consumer protection for buying digital content. I have personally bought movies from Google app store and downloaded them to my mobile device. After having access to the movies for some time they were removed from my purchased movies and were delete from my downloads (or made unaccessible) because thoes movies were no longer allowed in my area/country. I would like that the content I bought would still be accessible to me even if the content will no longer be allowed for purchase in my area/country or give me full refound of bought digital content. This protection should exctend to all digital content (such as video game).
